creator: nicovit@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

it looks the program doesn't run with ruby-fox16. Replacing

require 'fox12'

with

require 'fox16'

inside of all files, I get the error

/usr/local/share/mondrian/SourceBrowser.rb:441:in `initialize':
uninitialized constant Fox::FXWindow::ID_QUERY_TIP (NameError)
        from /usr/local/share/mondrian/SourceBrowser.rb:52:in `new'
        from /usr/local/share/mondrian/SourceBrowser.rb:52:in `initialize'
        from /usr/local/share/mondrian/Mondrian.rbw:120:in `new'
        from /usr/local/share/mondrian/Mondrian.rbw:120:in `initialize'
        from /usr/local/share/mondrian/Mondrian.rbw:1365:in `new'
        from /usr/local/share/mondrian/Mondrian.rbw:1365

Maybe it's better to stay with ruby-fox12, isn't?

Thanks, ciao.
-- 
Nicola Vitale
